summary: Iteration 22: Tested bulk settings endpoint and hero features admin. All features working correctly. Bulk endpoint returns all 32+ settings in one call. Hero features editing fields present in admin panel with correct data-testid attributes. All pages (/sauny, /balie, /, /blog) load correctly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bulk settings endpoint /api/settings/bulk working correctly. Returns all settings keyed by their DB 'id' field plus '_reviews' for reviews array. Hero features editing in admin panel: navigate to САУНЫ > Hero tab, scroll down to find 'Преимущества (бейджи на Hero)' section with 3 input fields (data-testid='hero-feature-input-0', 'hero-feature-input-1', 'hero-feature-input-2'). SettingsContext.js uses bulk endpoint for centralized settings. All pages load correctly.

bulk_settings_endpoint.details: GET /api/settings/bulk returns all settings in one response with correct structure

hero_features_admin.details: 3 feature input fields found with data-testid='hero-feature-input-0/1/2', values: 'Polska produkcja', 'Gotowe w 5-10 dni', 'Gwarancja 24 miesiące'

sauny_page.details: Hero section, PromoFeatures, SaunaAdvantages all visible and working

balie_page.details: Page loads with WM-Balia branding and all sections visible

main_landing_page.details: WM GROUP landing with Sauna and Balia cards visible

blog_page.details: Blog page loads with articles and category filters
